raw_consumer_statement:
My wife and I were traveling from XX/XX/XXXX until XX/XX/2024. Since my account has a feature that sends me a text when a purchase is larger than {$50.00}, I received a notice on XX/XX/XXXX that a purchase of approximately {$170.00} had been initiated, something identified as XXXX XXXX. I was unable to log in to contact my bank on XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX I receive XXXX messages from CITI Costco Fraud Dept about an attempt for {$250.00} and {$1000.00} ( both to XXXX XXXX ). I reached out to the Fraud Dept to verify that I had not attempted any of these charges. 

CITI removed the charges from my account and told me to cut up the card as they were sending a new card. I made charges in XXXX XXXX, NC ( hotel and dinner ) XXXX XXXX, FL ( hotel and restaurants ) XXXX XXXX XXXX, FL ( Parking Garage and restaurant ), XXXX, NC XXXX XXXX and restaurants ), XXXX VA XXXX restaurant ) as well a a number of gas stations.
